description_long: This is a glossy black ceramic vase with a wide, flared mouth and a rounded, bulbous body that tapers toward a narrow base. The surface is adorned with bold, red floral and foliate motifs, arranged in a decorative band encircling the midsection. A single, smoothly curved handle is attached to one side, seamlessly integrated into the vase's form. The finish is highly reflective, giving the vase a sleek and polished appearance. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding water or decorative items. The overall craftsmanship suggests a decorative piece intended for prominent display.
description: A glossy black vase with bold red floral motifs and a single curved handle, featuring a flared mouth and rounded body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flared mouth, rounded body, and prominent red floral motifs without the handle visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smoothly curved handle and the continuation of the red floral pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle centered, showing the symmetry of the vase and the floral motifs wrapping around.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle fully visible and the floral motifs continuing around the body.
